Skylabs Preons

VSL is not automatically staked after purchase. To receive staking rewards, go to staking dApp by selecting the staking icon in the navigation panel.

The minimum amount of VSL required to start staking is 100,000 VSL tokens, after which you may stake as many VSL tokens as you desire. You will receive 1.0 base preon for every 100,000 VSL staked.

Bonus preons can be acquired by locking your VSL into staking packages. These packages provide bonus preons based on the package requirements (such as the amount of VSL staked, length of time staked and tier requirement).

Your Vetter tier works as a multiplier to calculate your total preons. For more information on how to increase your multiplier, go to the Swap VETTER.

You will receive guaranteed allocations based on the total amount of preons you own in proportion to the total preons owned by the community.

[DISCLAIMER] THE TOKENS HAVE NOT BEEN AND WILL NOT BE REGISTERED UNDER THE US SECURITIES ACT OF 1933, AS AMENDED (THE “SECURITIES ACT”), AND MAY NOT BE OFFERED OR SOLD WITHIN THE UNITED STATES OR TO, OR FOR THE ACCOUNT OR BENEFIT OF, U.S. PERSONS (AS DEFINED IN REGULATION S UNDER THE SECURITIES ACT). THE SOLE PURPOSE OF THIS TOKEN IS TO MANAGE ACCESS TO FUNCTIONALITY. IT IS NOT TO BE BOUGHT FOR RESALE VALUE.
